column1: # Printimate Partition Table — 4 MB flash layout
# Offsets and sizes are in bytes (0x prefix = hex). Total must fit in 4 MB.
#   - otadata:  8 KB  — tracks which OTA slot is active
#   - app0:   1.875MB — OTA slot A (primary; active firmware)
#   - app1:   1.875MB — OTA slot B (staging for updates
#   - spiffs: 128 KB  — small filesystem for fonts/logos if Niklas needs it
#   - coredump: 64 KB — crash dumps pulled off-device for debugging
# DO NOT change offsets without also clearing flash on every team member's

column2: because the bootloader reads otadata from a fixed address.
